targets.query:
from(bucket: "my-bucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "sensor_1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["dataset"] == "${dataset}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["unit"] == "${unit}")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

list.name: dataset
list.query: from(bucket: "my-bucket") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry") |> keep(columns: ["dataset"]) |> distinct(column: "dataset")
list.label: Dataset

list.name: unit
list.query: from(bucket: "my-bucket") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "turbofan_telemetry") |> filter(fn: (r) => r["dataset"] == "${dataset}") |> keep(columns: ["unit"]) |> distinct(column: "unit")
list.label: Engine Unit
